text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 40 

LIVER_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Liver Disease, Cirrhosis and Other Liver Conditions (excluding Hepatitis) End-of-Year Indicator — 
Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for liver disease, cirrhosis, and 
other liver conditions (excluding hepatitis) as of the end of the calendar
